windows.embed_text_v2: burning three finished watermelon layered candles with red seeded tops white middle green base lit flames on wood table, then overhead steel pitcher dropping solid pale wax chunk into metal bowl
windows.summary_v2: An opening beauty shot of three lit watermelon-layered candles burning on a table cuts at the end to a top-down clip of solid wax being tipped from a steel pitcher into a metal bowl.

tags_v2.action: burning finished candles, then prepping wax
tags_v2.setting: light wood table in a cozy home interior with fairy lights

seconds_v2.desc: Three lit watermelon-style layered candles (green base, white middle, red seeded top) burn on a light wood table; two round and one heart-shaped, flames flickering.
Camera tilts closer to the trio of burning watermelon candles, showing painted black seeds on the red wax tops and steady flames.
The three watermelon candles continue to burn; the heart-shaped one at left and two round ones at right with bright wicks lit.
Close low-angle of the burning layered watermelon candles on the wood surface, red-white-green layers clearly visible.
All three watermelon candles burning together, melted wax pooling slightly at the wicks, soft bokeh fairy lights behind.
Slightly wider view of the three lit watermelon candles with warm string lights glowing in the blurred background.
The burning candles sit on the wood table with a blurred home interior and framed picture behind them.
Final beauty shot of the three lit watermelon layered candles, flames steady, cozy out-of-focus room in the background.
Hard cut to an overhead process shot: a stainless steel pouring pitcher tips a chunk of pale solid wax into a small steel mixing bowl on a wood table.

windows.embed_text_v2: pouring teal-green melted wax from silicone cup into clear glass beaker over red and white wax layers, two red silicone watermelon moulds with green wax discs, light wood table, fairy lights
windows.summary_v2: Teal-green melted wax is poured in a steady stream from a small silicone cup into a clear glass beaker that already holds red and white wax layers, beside two red watermelon moulds with setting green wax.

tags_v2.setting: light wood table with fairy lights

seconds_v2.desc: A small green silicone cup begins tipping teal-green melted wax toward a clear glass beaker already layered with red and pink wax; two red watermelon moulds with green wax cavities sit at right.
A thin stream of teal-green wax starts pouring from the cup into the glass beaker, joining the red and white layers below.
The green wax pours steadily into the clear beaker, pooling teal on top of the red layer; the red silicone moulds hold setting green discs at right.
Continuous teal-green wax stream fills the glass measuring beaker, the red base layer visible beneath it on the wood table.
Pouring continues; the teal-green wax rises in the beaker over the red layer, the two red moulds with green-filled circular wells nearby.
Steady green wax stream into the glass beaker, the molten teal swirling on the surface above the red wax.
The green wax keeps pouring into the beaker, building the colored layer; fairy lights glow in the blurred left background.
Teal-green wax continues to flow from the cup into the glass measuring beaker over the red base.
Pouring of green wax into the beaker continues steadily, the two red watermelon moulds with setting green wax discs still at right.
